case_title: ROBERT L. RED JR. VS. KEVIN MARK CLARK et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANTS WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.
